---
title: "Architecture Decision Records"
listing:
  contents:
    - "0*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title]
  sort: "date desc"
---

ADRs capture significant architectural decisions in devcontainer.nvim, with
the context that led to them and the alternatives considered. Older ADRs are
not edited; they are superseded by newer ones when a decision changes.
